positive: A whimsical, stylized design featuring a group of diverse, friendly forest creatures (foxes, owls, rabbits, deer) gathered around a glowing, bioluminescent mushroom patch. The composition should be circular and highly detailed, creating a central vignette suitable for a t-shirt print. Use a clean, graphic silhouette style with thick outlines and vibrant jewel-toned colors (deep teal, emerald green, sapphire blue) contrasted against a creamy off-white background. The lighting should suggest 'moon glow' and 'fairy lights,' giving depth without losing the clean print aesthetic. Minimalist, flat design elements mixed with intricate linework, symmetrical composition, high contrast, printable vector art.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, blur, jpeg artifacts, noisy, grain, watermark, signature, logo, text, poor anatomy, disfigured, low detail, messy, ugly, extra limbs, multiple people
